response.overview: In a city far from home, Hussain, a quiet university student from Chitral, struggles to fit into an environment where he feels disconnected from his language, culture, and identity. As he hides parts of himself to be accepted, a chance connection with Saba slowly pushes him toward self-acceptance. Through music, memory, and the comfort of his roots, Hussain begins a journey of rediscovering the voice he was once afraid to share.
response.tagline: “Somewhere between two worlds, he found himself.”
response.title: Wakhto Sum Justa Justa
